note: The A1/A2/A5 lanes are ONE harness extension (shared blind-spot + spine), forced linear build order; C9-3 ECE is the calibration promote-gate.

claim: EXTENDS eval_run_ablation host (H/M): root blind-spot — runAblation's per-query loop captures ONLY EvalResult[] (memoryId/score/rank, ablation-framework.ts:594-606), never verdict/confidence/tier. Add a parallel per-query capture (verdict + resolved confidence + row importance_tier/created_at) in the baseline pass. Mechanism exists: captureScoreSnapshot (pipeline/types.ts:403) + resolveAbsoluteRelevance (:89); PipelineRow.importance_tier/created_at (:19,26).

EXTENDS (H/S): one DB-join deriving 3 label views from graded relevance(0-3): citability per query (max>=2->expect cite; hard_negative forces non-citable); binary per (query,result) (>=threshold -> CalibrationSample.relevant); tier-tag (JOIN memory_index for importance_tier+created_at). GroundTruthEntry ALREADY has optional tier/createdAt (eval-metrics.ts:42-45, plumbing half-built); reuses inspectGroundTruthAlignment SELECT (ablation-framework.ts:247). Closes A5 no-tier-label gap automatically via DB-join.

NET-NEW (gate confusion + ECE/Brier) / EXTENDS (cold) (H/M): three metrics pooled at the AGGREGATION layer (corpus-level, attach at buildAggregatedMetrics NOT per-query computeQueryMetrics): (1) gate-verdict confusion + precision/recall/F1; (2) ECE+Brier+reliability bins; (3) cold-appearance-rate + cold-precision (EXTENDS computeColdStartDetectionRate eval-metrics.ts:475). All read C9-1 snapshot. Zero verdict-accuracy AND zero ECE in computeAllMetrics (:586).

NET-NEW/EXTENDS assertGroundTruthAlignment (H/S): extend the guard (today checks parent/chunk/missing only, ablation-framework.ts:314-352) with an embedding-coverage check over golden memoryIds that THROWS-with-remediation when coverage<threshold (reindex not run). Without it ECE mis-reads (un-embedded -> lexical-fallback confidence), cold-vector surfacing impossible, gate-accuracy wrong scale. Drop-in at :580-586.

The three missing accuracy lanes (A1 gate-verdict, A2 ECE, A5 cold-tier) are ONE harness extension — same root blind-spot (runAblation captures only EvalResult[]) + same spine. Forced linear build order: (0) assertEmbeddingCoverage -> (1) shared single-pass emit -> (2) enrichGroundTruth tagging -> (3) three corpus metrics. C9-3 ECE is the live-evidence gate that graduates isotonic fitCalibration from its phantom proxy; C9-1 emit + C9-2 binary label IS the labeled-traffic join the calibration header (confidence-calibration.ts:34-39) names as the one missing piece. A8's gate consumes these metrics.
